purpose: Use prediction-market observations as one timestamped research signal without enabling betting, trading, custody or money movement.
evidence_rules: Market probability is sentiment and capital-weighted opinion, not verified fact.
Record market ID, title, resolution criteria, source URL, retrieval time, liquidity and available spread.
Identify ambiguous or manipulable resolution wording.
Compare material claims with official and primary sources.
Record contradictory evidence and invalidation conditions.
Do not convert probability directly into a financial recommendation.
cost_policy: Use unauthenticated public reads and local caching first. Any paid data route requires current price review and owner approval.
production_gate: Read-only sandbox and staging proof, legal/jurisdiction review where applicable and explicit owner approval for any provider connection.
rollback: Disable the adapter, remove cached derived records according to retention policy and preserve timestamped evidence already cited in audit history.
